title: cupressus corneyana
intro: Cupressus corneyana, also known as cypressus, is a type of tree in the cypress family, characterized by its conical shape and scaly leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cupressus corneyana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including bronchitis and coughs.
